S-subagent-ui.title: research/iter4-ui-options.md — UI redesign subagent's 4 competing directions + recommendation (Direction C: Contextual Minimalism + Diegetic Agency)
S-subagent-ui.notes: Authored by a general-purpose subagent invoked from this session. Reliability B because the subagent's internal reasoning is not transparent — we see the output, not the deliberation. Credibility 5 because the subagent read the same skill we did and produced a coherent, internally-consistent set of arguments.

S-subagent-mech.notes: Same pattern as S-subagent-ui. Independent invocation; converged on the same primary recommendation.
